H a s i l space d a r i space integral subscript 1 superscript 3 left parenthesis 3 x squared plus 2 x minus 1 right parenthesis d x space equals......

c a r a colon space i n t e g r a l k a n space d u l u space b a r u space m a s u k a n space a n g k a space 3 space k e space h a s i l space i n t e g r a l space l a l u space k u r a n g i space d e n g a n space a n g k a space 1 k e space h a s i l space i n t e g r a l right parenthesis
